title: autobench.improver.ensemble v1
description: Per-iteration record of a multi-improver ensemble step (nervous-bus-9xd, wire-pop Phase 6). When the active improver is 'minimax_ensemble', SelfImprovingHarness fans out N anonymous improver calls per iteration and aggregates their proposed deltas — either by majority vote on field changes (Strategy A) or by running each delta forward and keeping the best-by-score arm (Strategy B). This event captures the N per-instance delta summaries plus the aggregator's vote outcome so the operator can see dissent and best-arm selection in real time. Source: /autobench.

iteration.description: Iteration number of the RSI loop in which the ensemble fan-out occurred.

strategy.description: Aggregation strategy used. 'vote' = majority vote on field deltas (cheap, default). 'parallel' = run each delta forward, keep best-by-score arm.

n_instances.description: Number of improver instances fanned out this iteration. Typically 3.

instances.description: Per-instance delta summary, one entry per improver call. Index matches fan-out order.

instance_idx.description: Zero-based index of this improver instance in the fan-out.

delta_summary.description: Compact ImprovementDelta fingerprint for this instance — enough to see what was proposed without dumping the full prompt/response. Free-form to tolerate schema drift on ImprovementDelta.

score.description: Strategy 'parallel' only: the aggregate_score this arm produced on its forward eval. Null in strategy 'vote'.

selected.description: True iff this instance's delta was kept by the aggregator (parallel best-arm) OR its proposed values won every contested field vote.

vote_outcome.description: Aggregator's per-field decision. For 'vote': maps each ImprovementDelta field to the winning value summary + tie info. For 'parallel': records the selected instance_idx and the arm scores.

selected_instance_idx.description: Strategy 'parallel' only: index of the winning arm. Null in strategy 'vote'.

selected_score.description: Strategy 'parallel' only: score of the winning arm.

field_votes.description: Strategy 'vote' only: per-field tally summary (which value won and by what margin). Free-form.

ties_broken.description: List of field names where the vote was tied and the tie-break heuristic fired.
